ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier code for the item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item in kg */,
  "item_fat_content" TEXT /* Fat content classification (e.g., Low Fat, Regular) */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility metric for the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., Dairy, Soft Drinks, Meat) */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum retail price of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the item */,
  "item_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the item category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier code for the outlet */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the outlet was established */,
  "outlet_size" TEXT /* Size of the outlet (e.g., Small, Medium, High) */,
  "outlet_location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2) */,
  "outlet_type" TEXT /* Type of outlet (e.g., Supermarket Type1, Grocery Store) */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* Address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_city" TEXT /* City where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_state" TEXT /* State where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_pincode" TEXT /* Pincode of the outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlet where the sale occurred */,
  "item_outlet_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the item at the outlet */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_time" TEXT /* Time of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlet for the sales summary */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the outlet */,
  "total_items_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of items sold at the outlet */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Dairy, Beverages) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlet being evaluated */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., sales growth, customer count) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance report */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlet_performance_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlet associated with the feedback */,
  "customer_rating" REAL /* Customer rating of the outlet (1-5) */,
  "feedback_comments" TEXT /* Comments left by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being promoted */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlet offering the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for the promotion */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item in inventory */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outlet holding the inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory update */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Sales Associate) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user role */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_chain" (
  "supply_chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply chain record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the item */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier */,
  "supply_chain_description" TEXT /* Description of the supply chain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
